title: tectaria mindanaensis
intro: Tectaria mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tectaria mindanaensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and extracts, can be made by drying the leaves and stems, then steeping them in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
